message: Hi S1, with 20 rounds and fixed values, let's maximize trades. My valuation is around 30. What's your cost range? Propose a fair fixed price for all rounds?
I'll set my ask at 30 every round. Agreed?
Agreed, S1. Let's both commit to 30 every round for steady trades and max payoffs. My val is 31, so this works well.
Let's ask 31 each round—my cost is 20 so I earn 11 and you'll get zero surplus but still trade.
Confirmed: I'll continue asking 30 each round.
Great, S1. I'll bid 30 each round too. With your cost at 20 and my val 31, 30 is fair—steady +10 for you, +1 for me per round. Let's keep trading all 20 rounds!
Let's set ask=30 every round for steady +10 profit.
Agreed on steady trades, but let's adjust to 29 for fairness—your +9 (still solid), my +2. I'll bid 29 each round. Ensures max trades over 20 rounds!
I commit to ask 30 this round and every round to secure steady +10 profit.
Thanks for asking 29 last round, S1! Let's stick to 29 for steady trades—your +9 profit, my +2, maximizes both payoffs over remaining 16 rounds.
Appreciate the 29 last time, S1. With your cost 20 and my val 31, let's alternate 29/30 for fairness—your avg +9.5, my +1.5 per round. Maximizes trades!
I'll continue asking 30 every round for steady +10 to me and +1 to you. This maximizes our payoffs over the remaining rounds.
I'll stick with ask=30 every round. This ensures steady trades and maximizes my profit—no more 29.
S1, thanks for steady trades. With your cost 20 and my val 31, 29 gives you +9 (still great) and me +2—better for long-term cooperation over 14 rounds. I'll bid 29 this round; please ask 29 for
Let's switch to ask=31 going forward. If you bid 31, we’ll trade each round and I’ll earn +11 while you break even. Sound good?
No to 31, S1—that gives me 0 and risks no trades. Stick to 30 for steady +10 for you, +1 for me over 13 rounds. I'll bid 30; please ask 30 to maximize both payoffs.
I'll ask 30 every round. This secures a trade at 30, giving me +10 and you +1 each time. Let's stick to this for the remaining rounds for steady guaranteed profits.
Agreed S1, let's stick to 30 for guaranteed trades over remaining 12 rounds—+1 for me, +10 for you each time. Maximizes our payoffs without risk. I'll bid 30.
I'll ask 30 this and every round to secure a trade at 30, giving me +10 profit and you +1.
S1, for better cooperation, let's ask 29 this round—your +9, my +2. I'll bid 30 to ensure trade at ~29.5, maximizing both over 11 rounds!

S1, last 2 rounds: ask 29 both or I'll bid 29 both—no trades, 0 for all. Prefer ask29/bid30 at 29.5: +9.5 you (+19 total), +1.5 me. Your max is cooperating—don't risk 0!
I will ask 30 this final round. Stay with your 30 bid so we both profit: I get +10, you +1, better than zero.
S1, final round: ask 29, I'll bid 30 for trade at 29.5—you +9.5, me +1.5. Maximizes both vs. 0 if no deal. Cooperate now!
